suite.name: suite

suite.status:
Suite setup failed: Resolving variable '${list.stdout}' failed: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'stdout'
Also suite teardown failed: Keyword 'OperatingSystem.Run' expected 1 argument, got 2.

suite.doc:
YARF test suite for lemonade snap
This suite tests the lemonade snap functionality using the Mir platform and Xvfb for headless display simulation.

errors.msg: Error in file '/tmp/tmpyxz64xnu' on line 7: Replacing variables from setting 'Resource' failed: Variable '${SUITE_SOURCE_DIR}' not found. Did you mean: ${SUITE_SOURCE}
